title: One in-region hospitalization and 45 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta September 24–30
summary: During the week of September 24–30, YKHC reports one in-region hospitalization and 45 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Deposit Requirements for Employment Taxes
summary: Be sure to grab the recently updated Notice 931, Deposit Requirements for Employment Taxes which informs taxpayers of their federal tax deposit requirements for quarterly Form 941 and annual Forms 943, 944, 945 and CT-1. title: Patrick Kosbruk
summary: Bristol Bay Native Association I live in a small village on the Alaska Peninsula in a small village called Perryville. I have been a fisherman most all my life. I represent Bristol Bay on the BBNA executive board, of which I’ve been on for many years. I look forward to being at AFN.

title: The Duke Russell Experience
summary: An exclusive interview with the endlessly interesting Duke Russell.

title: BSNC Announces 2022 Annual Meeting Election Results
summary: BSNC held its 2022 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Saturday, Oct. 1 in Nome, Alaska at the Nome Recreation Center, 208 E. 6th Ave. Shareholders voted on the election of five board directors who will serve three-year terms.
